title: sedum plicatum
intro: Sedum plicatum, also known as the pleated sedum, is a succulent plant species native to China and Korea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sedum plicatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Sedum plicatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
